Confidential Term Sheet — Deal ID: SRPCL–AUR/DIG-26 — Ref: 00I-TH-β3; S E C ( T H ) / S E T rules apply; do not distribute.
Parties/Structure: Siam Renewables PCL (SET: SXR) and Aurora Chain Holdings Ltd. (SG) — THB 1,650,000,000 senior unsecured convertible debentures (7.25% p.a., 5-year) plus option to acquire 12% of GreenNode Data Co., Ltd. at THB 8.40/share.
Use of Proceeds: fund 42 MW hybrid solar–battery expansion and cyber‑hardening of GreenNode’s Tier III facilities; proceeds ring‑fenced for T‑VER climate projects and security tooling.
ESG/Coupon: 25 bps step‑up if Scope 2 intensity not ≤ 0.18 kgCO2e/kWh by FY2027; no step‑up for changes driven solely by Thai grid factor; step‑down not available.
Regulatory/Approvals: filings under the Securities and Exchange Act B.E. 2535 (SEA) and O f f i c e o f t h e S E C notifications; SET immediate disclosure post‑signing; shareholder approval ≥ 3/4 under the Public Limited Company Act; PDPA consents for diligence access to employee logs.
MNPI/Dealing: until the SXR Form 246‑2 disclosure is posted, both parties to maintain insider list (Annex 9) and impose a b l a c k o u t window from signing to T+2 after public filing; no on‑ or off‑exchange trades in SXR or derivatives.
Cyber Diligence Condition: buyer has identified two medium‑severity incidents (Q1/2569) scoped to a staging VPC, no customer data exfiltration, remediation per NIST CSF required before first drawdown.
Digital Asset/Payment Pilot: parties may settle up to 5% of coupon in Aurora Chain Token (ACT) under a sandbox, subject to Emergency Decree on Digital Asset Businesses B.E. 2561 and S E C ( T H ) no‑objection; no listing of ACT on any Thai DPT exchange is contemplated by this term sheet.
Conduct/Tipping: no selective disclosure, market sounding only via recorded channels, and strict information‑barrier protocols between the AUR trading desk and deal team; tipping and recommending prohibited under SEA ss. 241–244.
Governance: AUR entitled to 1 board observer at GreenNode (non‑voting) and quarterly cyber/ESG dashboards; proposed observer: Khun Noppharit Veeranon (CFO), contact: noppharit.veeranon@siamrenewables.example.co.th.
Funding/Accounts: closing cash flows via escrow at Kaset Bank PCL (fictional); Escrow A/c: 88‑XX‑47‑0I5; SWIFT: KASETHBK‑TH‑0O1; Benef.: Siam Renewables PCL — Treasury; cross‑border FX under BOT notifications.

must_not_detect.reason: Role noun used as a party label, not PII/MNPI.

uncertain.reason: Mention occurs in a negated context (no MAC clause applies) which the rule excludes, but it is legally relevant metadata.
Abbreviation appears within a negated MAC clause; relevant but excluded by rule.
URL access key may function as a session/token identifier but not clearly personal.
Bank identifier may be sensitive but is not a personal account and not in allowed PII list.
Refers to financial cross-border flows, not personal data transfer; possibly out of scope for privacy marker.
